failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of TBAB/EG at lower temperatures or salt precipitation during reaction
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement heat-traced lines and a pre-column filter

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged exposure to 120°C leading to solvent decomposition or discoloration
failure_modes.mitigation: Perform TGA/DSC on solvent mixture to confirm stability at 120°C

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of DES (1:5 TBAB/EG) causing erratic delivery at Q=4.2 mL/min
failure_modes.mitigation: Install a pulse dampener downstream of the pump

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage due to DES precipitation leads to immediate overpressure
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run (4x tau) with pure DES at 120°C to monitor pressure drift and solvent degradation
Solubility stress test: cool the reactor to 20°C and measure the pressure required to clear any precipitates
Flow rate verification using a calibrated scale to ensure pump accuracy with high-viscosity DES
